description: Claude Code managed settings for GlycoGrit project - Security-focused permissions based on NOVA project patterns

comments.security: This configuration follows NOVA project security patterns
comments.secrets_protection: All secret files (.env, .pem, .key, etc.) are blocked from Read/Write/Edit
comments.destructive_commands: Destructive bash commands (rm -rf, sudo, chmod) are blocked
comments.network_commands: Network commands (curl, wget, ssh) are blocked for security
comments.git_safety: Git push and remote operations are blocked to prevent accidental pushes
comments.npm_safety: NPM publish operations are blocked to prevent accidental package releases
comments.read_only_operations: Claude can read code, run tests, and analyze but cannot modify secrets
comments.development_commands: Development commands (npm run, git status, build tools) are allowed

deny_patterns: Secret files: Prevent exposure of credentials and keys
Destructive commands: Prevent accidental data loss
Network commands: Prevent unauthorized external access
Git push: Prevent accidental code pushes
NPM publish: Prevent accidental package releases
